home.title: Telemedicine Booking Platform
home.subtitle: Book appointments with qualified doctors online — quickly, securely, and for free.

doctors.title: Our Doctors
doctors.subtitle: Browse our qualified medical professionals and book a consultation.
doctors.bio_1: Experienced in telemedicine consultations for common illnesses and preventive care. Over 8 years of clinical experience.
doctors.bio_2: Specialist in child health and development, with 10+ years of clinical experience in pediatric care.
doctors.bio_3: Board-certified cardiologist with expertise in heart disease prevention, hypertension management, and cardiac rehabilitation.
doctors.bio_4: Specializes in skin conditions, acne treatment, cosmetic dermatology, and teledermatology consultations.
doctors.bio_5: Internist focusing on diabetes management, thyroid disorders, and chronic disease management via telemedicine.

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we will confirm your appointment by email.
booking.doctor_name_placeholder: Enter doctor's name or leave blank for any
booking.notes_placeholder: Briefly describe your symptoms or reason for consultation...
booking.success_message: We will confirm your appointment by email within 24 hours.
booking.loginRequired: Please sign in to book an appointment.
booking.error_not_configured: Booking service is not configured. Please contact us directly.
booking.error_submission: Submission failed. Please try again or contact us directly.
booking.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
